description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Release that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have four jobs: linux, windows, macos, and create-release. The linux, windows, and macos jobs build and package the project for their respective operating systems, and upload the artifacts. The create-release job waits for the other jobs to finish, computes the build version, cleans up the work directory, downloads the artifacts, and uploads them as a release.
